zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie de Boisleux於1162年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯哈梅林古特時，她的父親Robert IV de Boisleux19歲，母親Blanche de Thourotte de COUCY18歲。她於1178年與Wallerland de BERLES結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1214年享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie de Boisleux于1162年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯哈梅林古特时，她的父亲Robert IV de Boisleux19岁，母亲Blanche de Thourotte de COUCY18岁。她于1178年与Wallerland de BERLES结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1214年享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie de Boisleux was born in 1162, in Hamelincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Robert IV de Boisleux, was 19 and her mother, Blanche de Thourotte de COUCY, was 18. She married Wallerland de BERLES in 1178. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1214, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie de Boisleux est née en 1162, à Hamelincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Robert IV de Boisleux, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Blanche de Thourotte de COUCY, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Wallerland de BERLES en 1178. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1214, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie de Boisleux 1162 in Hamelincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert IV de Boisleux 19 und ihre Mutter Blanche de Thourotte de COUCY 18. Sie hat 1178 Wallerland de BERLES geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1214 im Alter von 52 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Boisleux è nata il nel 1162 nel Hamelincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Robert IV de Boisleux, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Blanche de Thourotte de COUCY, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Wallerland de BERLES nel 1178. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1214, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie de Boisleuxが1162年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスハムリンコウルトで生まれた時，父Robert IV de Boisleuxは19歳，母Blanche de Thourotte de COUCYは18歳であった。1178年にWallerland de BERLESと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1214年に52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie de Boisleux(이)가 1162년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 해밀링쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert IV de Boisleux(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Blanche de Thourotte de COUCY(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1178년 Wallerland de BERLES(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1214년 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Boisleux nasceu em 1162, em Hamelincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Robert IV de Boisleux, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Blanche de Thourotte de COUCY, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Wallerland de BERLES em 1178. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1214, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie de Boisleux родилась в 1162 г. в местности хамелинкоурт, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert IV de Boisleux было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Blanche de Thourotte de COUCY, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wallerland de BERLES в 1178 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1214 г. в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie de Boisleux nació en 1162, en Hamelincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Robert IV de Boisleux, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Blanche de Thourotte de COUCY, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Wallerland de BERLES en 1178. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1214, a la edad de 52 años.
